headline: 3 Electronics Stocks Set to Benefit From a Prospering Industry
summary: Electronics stocks like KLAC, TER and FLEX are expected to benefit from investments in infrastructure and expanded capacity despite macroeconomic headwinds.

headline: Q1 Earnings Highlights: Teradyne (NASDAQ:TER) Vs The Rest Of The Semiconductor Manufacturing Stocks
summary: Wrapping up Q1 earnings, we look at the numbers and key takeaways for the semiconductor manufacturing stocks, including Teradyne (NASDAQ:TER) and its peers.
